english: Right Snake Creeps Down and Golden Rooster Stands on Right Leg
visual: Mirror of the left-side version — low creeping stance transitioning into a tall one-legged stance with opposite knee and hand raised.
motion_description: The person begins by lowering into a deep stance with their weight on a bent left leg and their right leg extended straight outward. They sweep their right hand down along the right leg while slowly shifting their body weight forward onto the right foot. As the weight fully transfers, the torso turns to face over the right leg and the person stands upright, drawing the left knee up to waist height. Concurrently, the right hand rises vertically in front of the chest to head-level, while the left hand presses downward near the left thigh, settling into a deliberate one-legged pause.
